positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial botanical diagram composition. The main subject is an intricate, stylized nebula forming a central, graceful arc, surrounded by delicate silhouettes of lunar moths, crystalline flowers, and abstract constellations. Use a sophisticated scientific illustration style mixed with Art Deco geometry. The color palette must be deep midnight blue, teal, and muted gold, rendered with crisp linework and high contrast. The composition must be clean, highly readable, and suitable for a central chest print on apparel. Isolated on a plain, soft cream background.
negative: low detail, blurry, out of focus, text, signature, watermark, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, artifacts, noise, messy, cluttered, realistic photography, logo, brand, copyright
